name: /prompt-eval: --dry-run runs the eval but does not write prompts/eval-history/<id>/<version>.json
command: mkdir -p evals/datasets/agents && echo '{"bootstrap_seed":true,"input":"x","expected":"y"}' > evals/datasets/agents/rsc-reviewer.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/prompt-eval.sh" rsc-reviewer --version 2.1.0 --dry-run && [ ! -f prompts/eval-history/rsc-reviewer/2.1.0.json ] && echo ok 1>&2
